<noinclude>
This is the '''Person''' template. It is used for pages about people connected to historic properties.

To create a new person page, use [[Form:Person]].

[[Category:Templates]]
</noinclude><includeonly>
{| class="wikitable" style="float:right; margin-left:1em; width:300px;"
|+ style="font-size:1.1em; font-weight:bold;" | Person
|-
! Name
| [[Person Name::{{{Person Name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}]]
{{#if:{{{Birth Year|}}}|{{!}}-
! Born
{{!}} [[Birth Year::{{{Birth Year|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Death Year|}}}|{{!}}-
! Died
{{!}} [[Death Year::{{{Death Year|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Occupation|}}}|{{!}}-
! Occupation
{{!}} [[Occupation::{{{Occupation|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Birthplace|}}}|{{!}}-
! Birthplace
{{!}} [[Birthplace::{{{Birthplace|}}}]]}}
{{#if:{{{Census Years Present|}}}|{{!}}-
! Census Years
{{!}} [[Census Years Present::{{{Census Years Present|}}}]]}}
|}

{{#if:{{{Associated Properties|}}}|
== Associated Properties ==
{{#arraymap:{{{Associated Properties|}}}|,|x|[[Associated Properties::x]]|, }}
}}

== Census Appearances ==
{{#ask:[[Category:Census Records]][[Head of Household::{{PAGENAME}}]]
|?Census Year
|?Census Address
|?Modern Address
|?Household Members
|format=table
|sort=Census Year
|order=asc
}}

== Sources ==
''Add sources documenting this person's connection to Benicia.''

[[Category:People]]
{{#if:{{{Occupation|}}}|[[Category:People by Occupation]]|}}
</includeonly>
